Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_DVCPro50NTSC

A type that identifies the Panasonic DVCPro-50 NTSC format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_DVCPro50NTSC: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
